keyPointsSummary: Professional emails are short and direct — one main point per email
'Please find attached', 'Please check the attachment' are standard phrases
Close with 'Thanks and regards' or 'Regards' + name
Use polite requests: 'Could you please...', 'Please send me...'

quickQuiz.hindi: प्रिय सर, आपके ईमेल के लिए धन्यवाद।
quickQuiz.answer: Dear Sir, thank you for your email.

quickQuiz.hindi: मैं इस मीटिंग में शामिल नहीं हो पाऊँगा।
quickQuiz.answer: I will not be able to attend this meeting.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह ईमेल महत्वपूर्ण जानकारी के लिए है।
quickQuiz.answer: This email is for important information.

quickQuiz.hindi: मैं इस प्रोजेक्ट पर काम कर रहा हूँ।
quickQuiz.answer: I am working on this project.

mustRememberRules: Professional emails are short and direct — one main point per email
'Please find attached', 'Please check the attachment' are standard phrases
Close with 'Thanks and regards' or 'Regards' + name
Use polite requests: 'Could you please...', 'Please send me...'
